case_title: ALEJANDRO SIERRA VS. BEE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BEE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIERRA, ALEJANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT BEE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BEE AUTOMOTIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
